name: 测运势
xmlContent:
<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable id="6zy)b!sFcW1p7.*TWp31">event</variable><variable id="vm3*%$!r!=_60K(jYNQl">response</variable></variables><block type="lua_custom_code" id="$N|L/v1})qG*9_%lG(D^" x="210" y="-170"><field name="CODE">function calculateFortune(qq, date)
    local seedStr = tostring(qq) .. date
    local seed = 0
    for i = 1, #seedStr do
        local charCode = string.byte(seedStr, i)
        seed = (seed * 31 + charCode) * i
        seed = seed % 1000000007
    end
    seed = seed < 0 and -seed or seed

    local function nextRandom()
        seed = (1103515245 * seed + 12345) % 2147483648
        return seed % 101
    end

    local caiyun = nextRandom()
    local taohuayun = nextRandom()
    local shiyeyun = nextRandom()
    local xueyeyun = nextRandom()

    local total = caiyun + taohuayun + shiyeyun + xueyeyun
    local avg = total / 4
    local luckLevel
    if avg >= 81 then luckLevel = "大吉"
    elseif avg >= 61 then luckLevel = "中吉"
    elseif avg >= 41 then luckLevel = "平"
    elseif avg >= 21 then luckLevel = "小凶"
    else luckLevel = "大凶" end

    local commentTags = {}
    if xueyeyun >= 90 then table.insert(commentTags, "学霸") end
    if taohuayun >= 90 then table.insert(commentTags, "桃花爆棚") end
    if caiyun >= 80 then table.insert(commentTags, "财运旺") end
    if shiyeyun >= 80 then table.insert(commentTags, "事业顺") end
    if #commentTags == 0 then table.insert(commentTags, "普通") end
    local comment = luckLevel .. "·" .. table.concat(commentTags, "、")

    local starCount = math.floor(avg / 14.28)
    local stars = string.rep("★", starCount) .. string.rep("☆", 7 - starCount)

    return string.format([[您今天的运势为...
财运：%d
桃花运：%d
事业运：%d
学业运：%d
点评： %s
%s
----------------------------------------]],
        caiyun, taohuayun, shiyeyun, xueyeyun,
        comment, stars)
end</field></block><block type="event_on_message" id="2X{;QpNV}[,C[wGX:/B_" x="190" y="-10"><field name="VAR" id="6zy)b!sFcW1p7.*TWp31">event</field><statement name="HANDLER"><block
